_template_description: Classical three-act emotional arc: setup → escalation → catharsis. For grief, loss, love, mentor arcs.

concept.one_sentence: Introduce the bond, escalate the stakes, deliver catharsis at the breakdown or vocal peak.

acts.name: setup
acts.notes: Establish relationships. Show what will be lost. Close-ups, eye contact, quiet moments.

acts.name: escalation
acts.notes: Stakes and separation rise. Intercut between fandoms. Growing tension.

acts.name: catharsis
acts.notes: The loss lands on the drop. Emotional release in the breakdown.
